title: C5: Consumption tracking — knowledge_consumed event + orphan_demote pivot
description: Close consumption loop. fab_get_knowledge_sections service writes knowledge_consumed event per call (one event per fetched stable_id, deduped within same request). Event fields: stable_id, session_id, client_hash, consumed_at. last_consumed_at derived state computed by replaying events.jsonl. Lint orphan_demote (existing #16) switches from last_referenced to last_consumed_at as decay signal. Anchor: handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for C5.

files.change: After resolving section content, emit knowledge_consumed event per stable_id; dedupe within request
Add knowledge_consumed event with fields stable_id, session_id, client_hash, consumed_at
Replace last_referenced derivation with last_consumed_at from knowledge_consumed events replay

implementation: Add knowledge_consumed event type to event-ledger.ts: { type: 'knowledge_consumed', stable_id, session_id, client_hash, consumed_at }

In knowledge-sections.ts service: after successful section fetch, iterate fetched stable_ids; dedupe via Set; emit one knowledge_consumed per id with current session_id (from request context) and client_hash (from headers/auth)
Implement derived state helper: replay events.jsonl, build Map<stable_id, last_consumed_at> by taking latest event per id
Update doctor.ts lint #16 orphan_demote: replace last_referenced lookup with last_consumed_at; threshold logic stays identical (e.g., >90d → demote candidate)
Add unit tests: knowledge_consumed event emitted on fetch; dedupe within request; orphan_demote uses last_consumed_at
Verify events.jsonl growth rate is reasonable (one per stable_id per fetch)

reference.pattern: Event emission from service layer + event replay for derived state
reference.examples: Existing event emission pattern in rule-context-planned

criteria: fab_get_knowledge_sections service writes knowledge_consumed event per fetched stable_id (deduped within request)
Event includes stable_id, session_id, client_hash, consumed_at fields
Lint orphan_demote (#16) uses last_consumed_at derived from knowledge_consumed events instead of last_referenced
Unit tests cover event emission, dedupe, and orphan_demote pivot

rationale.chosen_approach: Per-fetch event emission with request-scoped dedupe; replay-derived state for queries
alternatives_considered: Sample N fetches per id per day
decision_factors: Event ledger is canonical audit trail — derived state from events is consistent with existing pattern
Replay cost is bounded by KB size (small)
rationale.tradeoffs: events.jsonl grows ~ #fetches × #ids; acceptable given KB size and fetch cadence

manual_checks: fab_get_knowledge_sections with 3 stable_ids → verify 3 events emitted; second fetch in same request → still 3 events (dedupe within request)

risks.description: events.jsonl growth excessive with high fetch volume
risks.mitigation: Single user system, fetch volume is bounded; existing truncation policy covers
risks.fallback: Add daily-bucketed aggregation in rc.7+ if needed

key_functions.signature: function emitKnowledgeConsumed(stable_id: string, ctx: RequestContext): void

key_functions.purpose: Replay events to compute latest consumed_at per stable_id
